class.name: CassieFinalStroke
class.brief_description: Beautified, immutable stroke committed to the sketch graph.
class.description: Holds a [Curve3D] and helpers for projecting candidate intersection positions onto that curve. Graph-integrated methods (intersection insertion, segment mending, control-point extraction per segment) are deferred to the Tier-4 GDScript [code]sketch_graph.gd[/code] wiring.

method.name: closest_point
method.description: Returns the closest point on this stroke's curve to [param position].

method.name: get_constraint
method.description: Builds an intersection constraint at the curve's closest point to [param position]. When the closest point is within [param snap_to_existing_node_threshold] of an internal anchor, snap-to-node is recorded.

method.name: is_closed_loop
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the stroke was committed as a closed loop.

method.name: set_curve
method.description: Replaces the underlying curve and closed-loop flag.

members.member: Stable identifier assigned by the sketch graph.
